import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import socket from"../socket";import{motion}from"framer-motion";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";const colors=["#ff3355","#3399ff","#ffcc00","#33cc66"];function Player(){const[name,setName]=useState("");const[joined,setJoined]=useState(false);const[question,setQuestion]=useState(null);const[score,setScore]=useState(0);const[answered,setAnswered]=useState(false);const[time,setTime]=useState(0);const[countdown,setCountdown]=useState(0);// 🔊 sounds

bgMusic.loop=true;bgMusic.volume=0.3;bgMusic.play().catch(()=>{});socket.on("gameStarted",data=>{// 🔥 countdown effect
let c=3;setCountdown(c);const interval=setInterval(()=>{c--;setCountdown(c);if(c===0){clearInterval(interval);setQuestion(data.question);setTime(data.time);setAnswered(false);}},1000);});socket.on("nextQuestion",data=>{setQuestion(data.question);setTime(data.time);setAnswered(false);});socket.on("timer",setTime);socket.on("scoreUpdated",scores=>{if(scores[name]!==undefined){setScore(scores[name]);}});socket.on("gameOver",()=>{setQuestion(null);alert("🎉 Game Over!");});return()=>{socket.off("gameStarted");socket.off("nextQuestion");socket.off("timer");socket.off("scoreUpdated");socket.off("gameOver");bgMusic.pause();};},[name]);// ✅ join game

const sendAnswer=opt=>{if(answered)return;clickSound.play();const correct=opt===question.answer;if(correct)correctSound.play();socket.emit("answer",{name,correct});setAnswered(true);};// 🎮 JOIN SCREEN
if(!joined){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:styles.joinContainer,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(motion.div,{initial:{scale:0},animate:{scale:1},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{style:styles.title,children:"\uD83C\uDFAE Join Game"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{style:styles.input,placeholder:"Enter nickname",value:name,onChange:e=>setName(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{style:styles.joinBtn,onClick:joinGame,children:"JOIN"})]})});}// 🎯 GAME SCREEN
return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:styles.container,children:countdown>0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(motion.h1,{initial:{scale:0},animate:{scale:1.5},style:{fontSize:80},children:countdown}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h2",{style:styles.timer,children:["\u23F1\uFE0F ",time,"s"]}),question?/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(motion.h2,{initial:{opacity:0},animate:{opacity:1},style:styles.question,children:question.question}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:styles.grid,children:question.options.map((opt,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(motion.button,{onClick:()=>sendAnswer(opt),whileHover:{scale:1.1},whileTap:{scale:0.95},initial:{opacity:0,y:100},animate:{opacity:1,y:0},transition:{delay:i*0.1},style:{...styles.answer,background:colors[i],boxShadow:`0 0 20px ${colors[i]}`},children:opt},i))})]}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Waiting for host..."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h3",{style:styles.score,children:["Score: ",score]})]})});}export default Player;// 🎨 STYLES
const styles={container:{minHeight:"100vh",background:"linear-gradient(135deg, #0f0f0f, #1a1a1a)",color:"white",textAlign:"center",padding:20},joinContainer:{height:"100vh",display:"flex",justifyContent:"center",alignItems:"center",background:"linear-gradient(135deg, #111, #222)",color:"white"},title:{fontSize:40,marginBottom:20},input:{padding:12,fontSize:18,borderRadius:10,border:"none",marginBottom:20},joinBtn:{padding:12,fontSize:18,borderRadius:10,background:"#00e676",border:"none",color:"black",cursor:"pointer"},timer:{fontSize:24,marginBottom:10},question:{fontSize:26,marginBottom:20},grid:{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:15},answer:{padding:30,fontSize:18,borderRadius:15,border:"none",color:"white",cursor:"pointer",fontWeight:"bold"},score:{marginTop:20,fontSize:22}};
